attributes.action: Reduce VAT on fuel to ease pressure on drivers, businesses and households
attributes.additional_details:
Reducing VAT on fuel would ease pressure on households, support rural and semi-rural communities with no alternative transport options and help businesses manage rising operating costs. It would also provide a fairer, more proportionate approach to taxation at a time when many people are struggling to make ends meet.

Lowering VAT on fuel is a practical, targeted step that would deliver real help to people who need it most. The public cannot continue absorbing endless increases at the forecourt.
attributes.background: Lower the rate of VAT on fuel to provide immediate, meaningful relief to drivers and to help stabilise prices at the pump. Fuel is not a luxury; it is a necessity for commuting, caring responsibilities, accessing education, supporting local economies and keeping the country moving.

rejection.details:
Remove the VAT element of tax from the cost of fuel at the pump
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764916

Reduce fuel duty and remove VAT on petrol and diesel
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764175

Cut Fuel Duty by the Amount of Extra VAT Gained During Rapid Fuel Increases
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764898
